title: Iwebhsayithi ye-IATF
summary: Indawo kawonke-wonke yeQela eliSebenzayo lokuFikelela kuZwelonke.
problem: I-IATF yayidinga ikhaya loluntu elizinzileyo elicacisa imodeli, lidwelise iiprojekthi, lize libonise abo banegalelo kwinyathelo elilandelayo elifanelekileyo.
why: Le webhusayithi ngumnyango ophambili kawonke-wonke we-IATF. Yakhiwe njengeprojekthi encinci emileyo ukuze kube lula ukuyifunda, ukuguqulela, nokugcina kwindawo evulekileyo.
scopeIn: Amaphepha okufika kawonke-wonke acacisa imodeli ye-IATF
Ubhaliso loluntu lweeprojekthi ze-IATF ezamkelweyo, ezisebenzayo nezigciniweyo ezinemeko, umgcini, ugcino, kunye nedemo
Umthombo wesiNgesi kunye nesakhiwo esilungele ukuguqulelwa
Ukusetyenziswa kwe-static kwi-Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Iindawo zamalungu abucala, iiakhawunti, okanye imijikelezo yokungena
Ukubamba ikhowudi yomthombo weprojekthi, ehlala kwindawo yokugcina nganye yeprojekthi
Ukulandelela imiba yeeprojekthi ezizodwa, ezihlala kwindawo yogcino lweprojekthi nganye yeGitHub

title: I-selfie ye-IATF
summary: Umzekelo wokuqala we-IATF, ogciniweyo emva kokufikelela kwindawo yokumisa yendalo.
problem: Ukuphononongwa kwangoko kwesixhobo esijolise ekufikelelekeni phantsi kwesambulela se-IATF.
why: Indawo yokugcina igcinwa esidlangalaleni njengerekhodi yomsebenzi, nangona uphuhliso olusebenzayo luyekile.
scopeIn: Iprototype yokuqala yesixhobo esijolise ekufikelelekeni egcinwe njengerekhodi yoluntu

title: IATF bot
summary: I-bot yoluntu lwe-IATF, egciniweyo emva kokufikelela kwindawo yokumisa yendalo.
why: Indawo yokugcina igcinwa esidlangalaleni njengerekhodi yomsebenzi, nangona uphuhliso olusebenzayo luyekile.
scopeIn: I-automation ye-Discord ejikeleze amajelo oluntu e-IATF, agcinwe njengerekhodi yoluntu
